summary: Iteration 15: Frontend E2E Testing Complete. All 8 test cases passed. Tested 'View Attended Applicants' module (/attended-roles), 'View Applicants' module (/roles), and role drilldown page (/roles/:jobRole). All navigation flows, UI elements, table columns, filters, and pagination work correctly.

frontend: Login with admin/admin credentials - dashboard loads successfully
Dashboard shows all 3 analytics nav buttons (Summary, Roles, Attended)
/attended-roles page loads with empty state (0 attended applicants as expected)
/roles page shows role card 'AI & ML Engineer - C++ / Java Developer' with 5 applicants
Clicking role card navigates to /roles/:jobRole drilldown page
Role drilldown shows correct table columns: Name, Email, Phone, Gender, Date of Birth, Date of Application, Status
Role drilldown does NOT have score columns (ZA, C++, Java, etc.) - simplified view confirmed
Filter controls present: search input, start date, end date, Filter button, Reset button
Pagination controls present: first/prev/next/last page buttons, page input, Go button
Search filter works: typing 'Rishi' and clicking Filter shows 1 result

attended_roles_module.empty_state: Correctly shows 'No attended applicants found.' when 0 attended

roles_module.role_cards: Shows 'AI & ML Engineer - C++ / Java Developer' with count 5

seed_data_creation: Using existing test data: 5 registered applicants for 'AI & ML Engineer - C++ / Java Developer' role, 0 attended applicants
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend E2E tests passed. The app has 3 main analytics modules: (1) Summary Statistics at /summary, (2) View Applicants at /roles with drilldown at /roles/:jobRole, (3) View Attended Applicants at /attended-roles with drilldown at /attended/:jobRole. The role drilldown (/roles/:jobRole) has a simplified table without score columns. The attended drilldown (/attended/:jobRole) has score columns. Currently 5 registered applicants and 0 attended applicants in the database.
